vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

verify.rule: All required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Mass is within the design envelope.
P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins or chamfers to critical interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening during assembly leading to fastener failure.
risk.mit: Include torque limiters or visual indicators on assembly tools.

risk.desc: Cable strain relief may not be sufficient for repeated motion.
risk.mit: Increase strain relief geometry or add additional clamps.

risk.desc: Thermal management could be improved with additional cooling channels.
risk.mit: Design additional cooling channels or fins for better heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Structural reinforcement may not be adequate for high cycle fatigue.
risk.mit: Increase the thickness of critical structural elements or add additional ribs.

risk.desc: The slip ring may not provide sufficient power and signal routing capacity for the full range of motion.
risk.mit: Conduct a detailed electrical load analysis and consider increasing the slip ring capacity or using a more robust power transmission method.

risk.desc: The thermal management design for the J4 motor may not be sufficient to handle the heat dissipation requirements.
risk.mit: Perform a thermal analysis and consider adding a dedicated heat sink or improving the cooling airflow around the motor.

risk.desc: The fastener pattern may not provide adequate preload to ensure long-term joint integrity.
risk.mit: Review the fastener pattern and preload calculations to ensure they meet the required joint torque and cycle life.

risk.desc: The harness routing path may not allow for sufficient slack and strain relief, potentially leading to cable damage.
risk.mit: Review the harness routing and ensure that there is adequate slack and strain relief at each joint crossing.

risk.desc: The structural reinforcement may not be sufficient to handle the dynamic loads and cycle life requirements.
risk.mit: Perform a stress analysis and consider reinforcing critical areas or using a different material with higher strength-to-weight ratio.

verify.value: All interfaces have matching connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm in neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must have matching connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm in neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal hotspots due to dense component layout.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management features such as heat sinks and thermal vias.

risk.desc: Risk of electromagnetic interference (EMI) between power and signal lines.
risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and separation between power and signal lines.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient grounding leading to voltage fluctuations.
risk.mit: Verify grounding scheme and ensure return paths are properly routed.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly sequence leading to misalignment.
risk.mit: Follow the defined assembly sequence and use specified tools and torque values.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure service cover provides sufficient access for maintenance tasks.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window
